name: dryrun2-contact-manager
description: Build a simple contact manager web application. Users can create contacts with name, email, phone, and company. Users can edit and delete contacts. Users can search contacts by name or company. The app should have a clean, modern UI. Use Express.js with React and PostgreSQL via Drizzle ORM. Include API tests.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
